_meta.description: Fantasy scoring configuration for Fantasy Run For A Million. All point values defined here — never hardcoded in page HTML. Future: load from Supabase config table or CMS.
_meta.change_policy: Any changes to scoring values must be published to /scoring-rules before contest entry opens. Version this file on every change.

base_placement_points.description: Points awarded based on final placing in a discipline class
base_placement_points.notes: Positions 6-10 all earn 25 points. Any qualified completed run outside top 10 earns 10 points.

bonus_events.description: Additional point events on top of base placement

discipline_winner.label: Discipline Winner Bonus
discipline_winner.description: Rider wins their discipline class outright

highest_composite.label: Highest Composite Score
highest_composite.description: Rider posts highest composite score across all classes in their discipline

comeback_rider.label: Comeback Rider Bonus
comeback_rider.description: Rider finishes significantly higher in a final class than preliminary suggested

rookie_underdog.label: Rookie or Underdog Bonus
rookie_underdog.description: First-time or lower-seeded rider finishes top 5

fan_favorite.label: Fan Favorite Bonus
fan_favorite.description: Designated fan favorite rider per discipline earns a flat bonus for teams that selected them

change_window.notes: Finalize change policy before entry opens

tiebreaker_rules.description: Rules for breaking ties in fantasy standings
proposed_order: Highest single-class score across all selected riders

discipline_scoring_notes.reining: Points based on final placing in the open class. Composite scoring not applicable.
discipline_scoring_notes.cow-horse: Points based on composite placing across reined work, fence work, and cow work. Riders must complete all phases.
discipline_scoring_notes.cutting: Points based on final placing in the open class. Qualified run = completed run without disqualification.
